info.title: Salesforce Client Credentials
info.description: Salesforce connector using OAuth 2.0 client_credentials flow via Basic Authentication. Covers Core REST API (SOQL, sObject CRUD, Search), Composite API, Reports and Dashboards, Connect/Chatter APIs, Knowledge Articles, Search Suggestions, and Synonym Groups via Tooling API. MCP-enabled for Copilot Studio integration with dynamic sObject schema support.

get.description: Executes a SOQL query and returns matching records. Use for retrieving data from any Salesforce object.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: SOQL query string (e.g., SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE Industry = 'Technology')

nextRecordsUrl.description: URL for next batch if done=false

get.description: Retrieves the next batch of records for a query that returned done=false.
Executes a SOSL search across multiple objects. Use for full-text search.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: SOSL search string (e.g., FIND {Acme} IN ALL FIELDS RETURNING Account(Id, Name))

get.description: Returns a list of all available sObjects in the org.
Returns detailed metadata about a specific sObject including fields, relationships, and record types.

parameters.name: sObject
parameters.description: API name of the sObject (e.g., Account, Contact, Lead)

post.description: Creates a new record in the specified sObject.

get.description: Retrieves a single record by ID.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

patch.description: Updates fields on an existing record.

get.description: Returns JSON Schema for an sObject. Used internally for dynamic field population.
Returns the org's API limits and current usage.

post.description: Executes multiple API requests in a single call. Supports references between requests.

allOrNone.description: If true, all requests roll back on any failure

collateSubrequests.description: If true, independent requests execute in parallel

post.description: Executes up to 25 independent subrequests in a single call.
Creates a parent record and related child records in a single request.
Executes complex composite operations with dependencies between graphs.

get.description: Returns a list of reports available in the org.
Returns metadata for a specific report.

post.description: Executes a report and returns the results.

get.description: Returns a list of dashboards available in the org.
Returns dashboard metadata and current component data.

put.description: Refreshes all dashboard components to show current data.

get.description: Returns feed elements for a specified feed type.

post.description: Creates a new feed element (post) on a user's feed or a record.

subjectId.description: User ID or Record ID to post to

get.description: Returns a specific feed element by ID.

post.description: Adds a comment to a feed element.

get.description: Returns Chatter user profile information.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID or 'me' for current user

get.description: Returns a list of Chatter users.
Returns a list of Chatter groups.
Returns details of a Chatter group.

post.description: Adds the current user as a member of the group.

get.description: Returns a list of topics in the org.
Returns a list of Knowledge articles visible to the current user.
Returns the full content and metadata of a Knowledge article.

post.description: Creates a new Knowledge article draft.

articleTypeApiName.description: API name of the article type (e.g., FAQ__kav, Knowledge__kav)

fields.description: Additional article fields as key-value pairs

patch.description: Updates a Knowledge article. Can also manage article lifecycle (publish, archive, draft).

articleTypeApiName.description: API name of the article type

get.description: Returns suggested searches based on the user's query string, matching searches that other users have performed in Salesforce Knowledge.
Returns Knowledge article titles that match the user's search query string.

parameters.name: articleType
parameters.description: Article type API name to filter by

get.description: Executes a SOQL query against the Tooling API. Use to query synonym groups (SearchSynonymGroup) and other tooling objects.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: SOQL query for Tooling API objects (e.g., SELECT Id, GroupName FROM SearchSynonymGroup)

post.description: Creates a new search synonym group in the org.

Synonyms.description: Comma-separated list of synonym terms (e.g., 'CRM, customer relationship management, salesforce')

id.description: ID of the created synonym group

get.description: Returns details of a specific synonym group.

post.description: Creates a new support Case in Salesforce.

Description.description: Detailed description including environment, steps to reproduce, and what was already tried

Origin.description: Channel the case originated from (defaults to Chat)

ContactId.description: Contact record ID to associate with the case

AccountId.description: Account record ID to associate with the case

get.description: Retrieves a Case by ID including CaseNumber, Subject, Status, Priority, and other fields.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return (e.g., CaseNumber,Subject,Status,Priority)

patch.description: Updates fields on an existing Case.

post.description: Adds a comment to an existing Case.

ParentId.description: Case record ID this comment belongs to

IsPublished.description: Whether the comment is visible to portal users (default false)

post.description: Creates a Copilot_Interaction__c record for deflection tracking and metrics.

Channel__c.description: Surface point where the interaction occurred

Summary__c.description: Brief summary of the interaction and resolution

Case__c.description: Case ID if a case was created

get.description: Retrieve a Case with its full timeline: CaseComments, EmailMessages, and FeedItems via composite API.

200.description: Case timeline with comments, emails, and feed items

post.description: Create an outbound email (draft or sent) linked to a Case.

ParentId.description: Case ID to associate the email with

get.description: Search Knowledge articles matching a case's subject and description.

parameters.name: caseId
parameters.description: Case ID to find matching KB articles for

parameters.name: search_terms
parameters.description: Additional search keywords to refine results

case.description: Case context used for the search

post.description: Create a Knowledge article draft pre-populated with data from a resolved case.

case_id.description: Case ID to base the article on

patch.description: Update a Case with categorization fields and add an internal comment explaining the rationale.

get.description: Returns case volume grouped by a specified field over a time period. Use for trend analysis, top-case-driver reports, and manager dashboard queries.

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Field to group by (e.g., Type, Reason, Priority, Status, Origin)

parameters.name: min_count
parameters.description: Minimum count threshold to include in results

get.description: Returns interaction outcome counts from Copilot_Interaction__c with deflection rates. Optionally groups by topic, channel, or severity.

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Optional grouping: Topic__c, Channel__c, Severity__c, or none

get.description: Analyzes first-response times against SLA thresholds by priority. Returns compliance percentages and identifies breached cases.

compliance_by_priority.description: Compliance stats per priority (total, within_sla, breached, no_response)

post.description: Model Context Protocol endpoint for Copilot Studio integration. Provides AI agents access to Salesforce operations as tools.

tags.name: Synonyms
tags.description: Search synonym group management via Tooling API

tags.name: Cases
tags.description: Support case lifecycle — create, read, update, and comment

tags.name: Case Productivity
tags.description: AI-powered case actions — summaries, emails, KB suggestions, and categorization

tags.name: Reporting
tags.description: Analytics, trend detection, deflection metrics, and SLA compliance reporting
